issues.headline: Anthropic buys Bun and Claude Code crosses $1B as Google ships Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
Figma opens its canvas to agents as AWS ships AgentCore and LG releases a 33B open VLM
Lazarus Group compromised OpenAI's macOS signing pipeline via Axios npm attack
Amazon confirms $15B AWS AI revenue while agent platforms take shape
Anthropic ships dual-model advisor API as Amazon discloses $15 billion AWS AI run rate
Meta Superintelligence Labs ships Muse Spark, its first model, with a multi-agent deliberation mode built in
Anthropic's Mythos security model finds thousands of vulnerabilities but is restricted to 40 organizations due to its offensive capabilities
Sam Altman proposes a new social contract for ASI as Meta prepares to open-source its next model family
Anthropic cuts off third-party agent platforms from Claude subscriptions, forcing migration to API pricing
OpenAI makes its first media acquisition, buying live tech show TBPN, as a solo founder hits $1.8B in sales using only AI tools
Google releases Gemma 4 and ships free AI video in Google Vids with Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1
FIPO tops HuggingFace with 330 votes as RL reasoning research dominates
Qatar's helium shortage puts AI chip fabs on a two-week clock
Anthropic opens a research institute and signs a $200M deal with Snowflake
Sam Altman told OpenAI staff he tried to save Anthropic from Pentagon blacklist while his company took a competing defense contract
CMS misconfiguration exposes Anthropic's unreleased Mythos, rated unprecedented cybersecurity risk
ARC-AGI-3 exposes frontier AI adaptation gap as OpenAI rounds $120B and Google ships 6x memory compression
OpenAI kills Sora and readies Spud as Anthropic, Mistral, and Apple expand their infrastructure positions
Anthropic ships computer use, LiteLLM gets backdoored, and the enterprise agent land-grab accelerates
LiteLLM gets backdoored, Nvidia ships agent security infrastructure, and OpenAI winds down Sora
